title: Covered Call Option Strategy #optionstrading
text: The standard covered call equals this The standard covered call equals this formula. If I have 100 shares, you need formula. If I have 100 shares, you need formula. If I have 100 shares, you need to have at least 100 shares because to have at least 100 shares because to have at least 100 shares because options trade in 100 share contracts options trade in 100 share contracts options trade in 100 share contracts called lots. So if I have 100 shares and called lots. So if I have 100 shares and called lots. So if I have 100 shares and I sell one short call, that means that I sell one short call, that means that I sell one short call, that means that at some point my deltas are going to at some point my deltas are going to at some point my deltas are going to equal my long deltas and short deltas equal my long deltas and short deltas equal my long deltas and short deltas will balance and cancel each other out. will balance and cancel each other out. will balance and cancel each other out. And that's where you hit your max And that's where you hit your max And that's where you hit your max profit.
